appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: Live Stability section with testing approach, key files, and backend test command for live-stability milestone assertions. Updated seeded demo audit ID.

VAL-STAB-001.method: Code inspection of audit_orchestrator.py run_audit() showing top-level try/except with _handle_audit_failure() + unit test test_audit_reaches_failed_state_on_exception PASSED
VAL-STAB-001.evidence: run_audit() wraps _run_audit_internal() in try/except, calling _handle_audit_failure() which sets status='failed', completed_at, and error summary

VAL-STAB-002.method: Code inspection of _handle_audit_failure() creating AuditEvent with phase='error' + unit test test_terminal_error_event_emitted PASSED
VAL-STAB-002.evidence: AuditEvent created with phase='error', status='error', message containing exception details, details dict with error_type, error_message, audit_id

VAL-STAB-003.method: Code inspection of nova_act_browser.py showing SCENARIO_TIMEOUTS dict with per-scenario defaults (90-180s) + _run_scenario_with_personas() with TimeoutError handling + unit tests PASSED (test_default_scenario_timeouts, test_custom_scenario_timeouts, test_get_scenario_timeout_method)
VAL-STAB-003.evidence: DEFAULT_SCENARIO_TIMEOUT=120s, per-scenario overrides configurable via constructor. TimeoutError caught gracefully, creates error_observation, emits warning event, continues to next persona

VAL-STAB-004.method: Full pytest suite execution: 183 passed, 0 failed, 1 non-critical warning
VAL-STAB-004.evidence: cd backend && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest tests/ -v --tb=short => 183 passed in 6.89s
